case_title: KRIZMANICH JOSEPH L VS DOMINO WILSON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY KRIZMANICH JOSEPH L AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINO WILSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINO WILSON
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-04-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-22-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRIZMANICH JOSEPH L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOMINO WILSON $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,333.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-22-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-01-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-01-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-01-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
FILE SENT TO JUDGE WICK TO RENDER JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DOMINO WILSON HEARING SET FOR JUN-27-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED FORWARDIND ORDER EXPIRED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-27-1994, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINO WILSON DEFT 'S INSURANCE COMPANY HAS PAID THE CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRE.
